observed: Independent readiness review found two bounded plan defects: ambiguous continuation boundaries and non-executable package/upgrade parity. The plan now defines an indentation-based stop/sibling rule, requires an unrelated-prose fixture, and requires executable extracted-package plus post-upgrade parser probes. Recheck verdict READY with no remaining blocker.
proposition: wave-council-readiness approves the current affected scope
safety_and_authorization: Local review evidence only; no external side effects.
